entry.data:
CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING
SHOWERS
HIGHS AROUND 70
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE MID 50S IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
BREEZY AND MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S

data.HIGHS: SUNNY, COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S

entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

PARTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A 50 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
